name: @unitn-asa/deliveroo-js
description: Deliveroo.js Development Kit - Autonomous Software Agents - 2023
author: Marco Robol <marco.robol@unitn.it>

scripts.clean: rm -r node_modules && rm -r backend/docs && rm backend/.git-revision && rm -r frontend/dist && rm -r frontend/docs && rm -r frontend/node_modules
scripts.build: cd frontend && npm run build && cd ../backend && npm run build
scripts.dev-all: npm run dev & npm run dev-ui
scripts.docs: cd backend && npm run docs && cd ../frontend && npm run docs
